name: Healthcare Financial
description_short: Unity Financial Credit Union issues Visa Classic and Visa Secured credit cards with fixed rates starting at 14% APR, no annual fees, and optional payment protection plans for members.
description_long:
Unity Financial Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union (Routing #211178349) that offers credit card products to its membership base. The organization provides both unsecured Visa Classic and secured Visa Secured credit card options, positioning itself as a member-focused alternative to traditional banks for credit card issuance.

The credit union's card portfolio includes the Visa Classic card with APR rates between 14.00%-18.00% for purchases (based on creditworthiness at account opening), and the Visa Secured card with a fixed 18.00% APR. Both products feature 24-hour online access through their banking portal, chip technology fraud protection, and optional payment protection plans. Cash advances and balance transfers are available at 18.00% APR. The company emphasizes a 25+ day grace period on purchases when the full balance is paid by the due date, meaning no interest accrues if balances are paid in full monthly.

Unity Financial differentiates itself through membership-based access, no annual fees, and integration with a broader credit union product suite including auto loans (advertised as low as 4.75% APR), money market accounts, and share certificates. The organization also offers optional insurance products and discounts on auto/home coverage for members. Their CU Rewards program is highlighted as a card benefit, though specific reward details are not disclosed on the reviewed pages.

The Visa Secured card serves those building or rebuilding credit, though specific collateral requirements and credit limits are not detailed in available materials. While competitive rates exist for qualified borrowers on the Visa Classic card, the 14%-18% range is standard market pricing, not exceptional. The lack of detailed information about rewards structure, credit limit ranges, and specific membership requirements limits transparency for prospective cardholders. For those with damaged credit, credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus. Secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to rebuilding credit scores over time. As credit improves, consumers may qualify for installment loans with lower rates than credit card balances.
services: Visa Classic credit cards with 14%-18% APR for purchases
Visa Secured credit cards with 18% fixed APR
24-hour online banking access and payment management
Chip technology fraud protection and unusual activity alerts
Auto loan financing (advertised as low as 4.75% APR)
Money market accounts and share certificates
Insurance products and coverage discounts for members
Loan and savings calculators on website
pros: No annual fee on either Visa Classic or Visa Secured card
Fixed interest rates (not variable), providing payment predictability
25+ day grace period on purchases when full balance paid monthly
24-hour online access through secure banking portal for balance checks and payments
Chip technology and fraud protection with unusual activity notifications
Optional payment protection plans available for cardholders
Visa Secured card option available for credit building or rebuilding
Integration with credit union membership benefits including insurance discounts
cons: Visa Classic APR range of 14%-18% is standard market rate, not competitively low
Visa Secured card locked at higher 18% APR with no rate reduction based on creditworthiness
Foreign transaction fee of 1% applies to all overseas purchases
Late payment, over-limit, and returned payment fees all set at $25 (or percentage of transaction)
Limited transparency: reward details, credit limit ranges, and membership eligibility criteria not disclosed
Same-day payment fee of $25 suggests no penalty-free expedited payment option
best_for: Credit union members seeking no-annual-fee credit card with fraud protection
Consumers with fair credit looking to rebuild with a Visa Secured card option
Members wanting integrated credit union account management across cards and loans
Borrowers prioritizing fixed rates and grace periods over rewards programs
diagnosis: Unity Financial Credit Union's credit cards are best suited for existing credit union members and those seeking to build credit through a Visa Secured product, particularly those who prioritize no annual fees and fraud protection over rewards. The main caveat is that APR rates (14%-18% for Classic, fixed 18% for Secured) are market-standard, not advantageous compared to national card issuers, and the company lacks transparency about rewards structure and membership requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
